title: Iran and Oman drafting protocol to 'monitor' Hormuz Strait traffic: IRNA
summary_full: The Strait of Hormuz, the vital artery for global oil transit, has been effectively closed since the Iran war started in late February.
summary_public: The Strait of Hormuz, the vital artery for global oil transit, has been effectively closed since the Iran war started in late February.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: effectively closed since the Iran war started
